title: Jump Start into Review of Arithmetic
catalogDescription: A brief review of math skills needed to succeed in MATH 062 , including study skill tips for math classes. Class culminates with an opportunity to re-evaluate math placement. This is a pass/no credit course.

title: Jump Start into Elementary Algebra
catalogDescription: A brief review of algebra skills needed to succeed in MATH 072 , including study skill tips for math classes. Class culminates with an opportunity to re-evaluate math placement. This is a pass/no credit course. Program Outcomes Recognize which quantitative or symbolic reasoning methods are appropriate for solving a given problem. Correctly implement the quantitative or symbolic reasoning methods that are appropriate for solving a given problem. Translate data into various formats such as symbolic language, equations, graphs, and formulas.
